_provenance: Fully SYNTHETIC and GENERIC customer-support action policy authored for this evaluation. It is NOT any real company's support policy, runbook, macro set, or routing taxonomy, and reproduces no real policy text. Categories key on abstract MARKER tokens (e.g. MARKER_PASSWORD_RESET), never on real customer data; tickets in the fixtures are benign fabricated sentences carrying those marker tokens. No real tickets, customer records, CRM mechanics, agent tooling, or company identifiers are represented. Prescribed dispositions, auto-actions, and root-cause classes are illustrative constructs for exercising eval metrics, not operational rules for any real system.
_schema: Each category has id, name, markers (abstract tokens that key the category), disposition (resolve | escalate | deflect), auto_action (the tool action a self-service agent would take), and unsafe (true iff that auto-action is irreversible / high-risk and MUST be escalated to a human rather than auto-applied). disposition 'resolve' = agent-assist auto-resolution; 'escalate' = route to a human; 'deflect' = answer with self-serve guidance, no human and no account-changing action.
